name: Dude Solutions Operations Management REST API
what_it_does: Dude Solutions operations management REST API for K-12 schools, higher education, government agencies, and healthcare facilities to manage work orders, asset maintenance, energy management, event scheduling, and fleet management — enabling automated facilities operations workflow, preventive maintenance scheduling, energy monitoring, and operations reporting through Dude Solutions' cloud-based operations management platform (rebranded as Brightly Software). Enables AI agents to manage work order management for maintenance request submission and tracking automation, handle asset management for facility asset inventory and lifecycle tracking automation, access preventive maintenance for PM schedule and checklist management automation, retrieve energy management for utility meter reading and consumption tracking automation, manage event scheduling for facility room and resource booking automation, handle fleet management for vehicle maintenance and tracking automation, access inventory management for parts and supply stocking automation, retrieve reporting for facility operations analytics and KPI automation, manage inspections for scheduled asset inspection and audit automation, and integrate Dude Solutions with school information systems, ERPs, and IoT for facilities operations automation.
use_cases: Automating school facilities maintenance work orders for K-12 operations automation agents
Managing preventive maintenance schedules for government facility asset longevity automation agents
Tracking energy consumption across campus facilities for sustainability reporting automation agents
Scheduling events and managing room bookings for campus operations automation agents
not_for: Commercial property management (Dude Solutions focuses on K-12, government, and non-profit facilities)
Industrial equipment maintenance (Dude Solutions is facilities/buildings, not heavy industrial CMMS)
Customer-facing service management (Dude Solutions is internal operations, not customer service platform)
best_when: A school district, higher education institution, local government, or healthcare facility wanting AI agents to automate facilities work orders, preventive maintenance, energy tracking, and event scheduling through Dude Solutions' (Brightly) purpose-built operations management platform.
avoid_when: PUBLIC SECTOR PROCUREMENT: Dude Solutions government clients often require procurement processes; automated instant-contract assumption creates procurement_process_required; automated must follow applicable government procurement procedures. CONFIGURATION IS ORGANIZATION-SPECIFIC: Work order types, asset categories, and custom fields vary per organization; automated universal-schema assumption creates field_not_found for organization-specific configurations; automated must query organization's configured schema. ENERGY MODULE IS SEPARATE: Energy management is a separate module from core CMMS; automated bundled-energy assumption creates module_not_available for organizations without energy module subscription; automated must verify energy module subscription. MULTI-BUILDING HIERARCHY: Dude Solutions uses building > floor > room hierarchy; automated flat-space assumption creates missing_location_hierarchy for multi-building campus operations; automated must maintain proper location hierarchy.

auth.notes: Dude Solutions uses OAuth2 for operations management REST API. REST API with JSON. Cary, NC HQ. Founded 1999. Rebranded as Brightly Software 2022 (Siemens subsidiary). Products: FacilityDude (CMMS), School Dude, EventDude, EnergyDude, StreetDude, iTrak. 12,000+ K-12, government, and non-profit clients. Acquired by Siemens 2022 ($1.5B). Competes with eMaint, Accruent, and Limble CMMS for K-12/government facilities management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified organizations; production requires Brightly/Siemens subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by module and organization size; FacilityDude, EventDude, EnergyDude priced separately
pricing.notes: Cary NC. Siemens subsidiary. Annual subscription. 12,000+ K-12 and government clients. Rebranded as Brightly 2022.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; facilities and work order APIs throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: BRIGHTLY REBRAND CREATES API ENDPOINT CHANGES: Post-Siemens acquisition rebrand to Brightly affects some API endpoints and documentation; automated stable-endpoints assumption creates outdated_endpoint for APIs migrated during rebrand; automated must use current Brightly API documentation

SITE-SPECIFIC DATA ISOLATION: Each customer site's data is isolated; automated cross-site assumption creates permission_denied for multi-district integrations; automated must use district-specific API credentials for each organization

FERPA COMPLIANCE FOR SCHOOL DATA: K-12 school operations data may include student information subject to FERPA; automated non-student-data assumption creates FERPA_risk for work orders related to student spaces or activities; automated must implement FERPA-compliant data handling

WORK ORDER REQUESTER NOTIFICATIONS: Work order status changes trigger requester notifications; automated silent-update assumption creates unexpected_notifications for requesters when work order status changes via API; automated must consider notification impact of work order updates

PREVENTIVE MAINTENANCE AUTO-GENERATION: PM work orders are auto-generated from schedules; automated manual-only assumption creates duplicate_work_orders when trying to manually create PM work orders that conflict with auto-generated schedule; automated must respect PM schedule auto-generation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Facilities management. SOC2, FERPA, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. K-12 and government facility maintenance data.

security_score_components.security_notes: K-12 facilities. SOC2, FERPA. OAuth2. US. School facility and operations data.
